title: Pungent Indian Jalebi
description: A flavorful and spicy jalebi recipe that is perfect for a solo dinner. The combination of garlic powder and shio-cure gives this dish a unique and pungent flavor.
instructions: Combine the gluten-free flour, baking soda, garlic powder, and shio-cure in a bowl and mix well.
Gradually add the water to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter is formed.
Heat the ghee or oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Once the oil is hot, reduce the heat to low and fry the batter in a circular motion to form the jalebi shape.
Fry the jalebi until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain the jalebi on a paper towel and then soak them in a sugar syrup made by dissolving the sugar in 1 cup of water.
Serve the jalebi hot, garnished with cardamom powder.
